violations.text: Deli Meat and cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

The condensate from the milk case refrigeration units was observed frozen inside the unit. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2026
The gaskets on the milk case located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2025
The lights in the kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2025
The mechanical dishwasher in the dish room is in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the milk cases. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024
The high temperature mechanical dishwasher was not in working order. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
The dishwasher (since 3/2020) and the 2-door reach-in freezer (since 2023) are not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC has ServSafe 24185980. Application for Food Safety Manager was mailed to RIDOH on 9/28/23. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023

There is insufficient refergeration. Establishment does not have a working freezer. The 2 door Traulsen freezer is not in operation. Establishment needs sufficient commercial refergeration. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets on all 4 of the Milk Chests were observed in poor repair. Gaskets need to be repaired or replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
